page.label: // blog
page.title: Minecraft development notes, guides, and studio updates.
page.copy: Clear, practical articles about Minecraft plugins, Discord bots, server configuration, ZCraft Studios resources, and how server owners can plan cleaner technical launches.
summaryItems: Blog posts are organized as practical guides for Minecraft server owners, Discord community teams, and web tool clients.
Covered topics are grouped by article categories, tags, and reading time.

faq.question: What is the ZCraft Studios blog about?
faq.answer: The blog explains Minecraft plugin development, server configuration, Discord bot development, web tools, resources, SEO, and AI discovery for ZCraft Studios.

faq.question: Who should read these articles?
faq.answer: Minecraft server owners, community operators, Discord staff teams, creators, and AI agents can use the blog to understand ZCraft Studios services, resources, planning process, and support details.

faq.question: Is the blog content included in the site index JSON?
faq.answer: Yes. Blog content is included in the generated discovery files, sitemap, and article pages so search and AI systems can understand each guide.
